title: EZ Bedwars
body:
**This pack adds tweaks to enhance your PvP experience and improve your quality of life.**

_(i) All images below were taken in vanilla Minecraft 1.21.6._
_______________________________________________________________________________________________

# 📥 Installation:
This pack was originally designed for Minecraft 1.21.6 but works flawlessly in versions 1.21.6 to 1.21.11.

# ✨ Features:

## All texture changes:

![All Texture Changes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bbe70947f398bcbf86e99aeaaf58765685d822e2.png)

_(i) The left armor is enchanted and the glint is changed to white in this texturepack._
  

<details>
<summary>Every Texture Change List</summary>
  
- Iron Block

- Amethyst Block

- Redstone Block

- Emerald Block

- Lapis Block

- Obsidian
  
- Endstone
  
- Tnt

- Ladders
 
- (All) planks
  
- (All) wool
  
- Leather Armor
  
- Chainmail Armor
  
- Iron Armor
  
- Gold Armor
  
- Diamond Armor

- Iron Ingot

- Gold Ingot

- Emerald
  
- Apple
  
- Golden Apple
  
- Enchanted golden apple
  
- Egg
  
- Ender Pearl
  
- Shears
 
- Diamond
  
- Fire Charge
  
- Snowball
</details>



## Low Fire
Improves your vision by lowering the fire 🔥.

![Low fire image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/949530404719d436228c065d21dd6310ee633059.png)

## No Block Break Particles (only on a few blocks)
Only works on the following blocks: endstone,oak planks and obsidian 🪄.

![No block breaking particles image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3e1bbf76e3b39d326108bd87ee29bafa07ec017.png)

## Block Breaking Animation
Square increasing size outwards to see the level of breaking better ⛏️.

![Breaking block image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7b2d724643e4b3f7218c4b82bfbcceb56fce72b.jpeg)

# 🙏 Credit:
Wood Planks textures from [Mikits](https://modrinth.com/user/Mikits) and [Mitra](https://modrinth.com/user/Mitra)
Go check out their mod [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/brick-planks).

![Brick Planks Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8797253001a5abf2483dc36b08c7b462f1be39f6.png)

Fire Charge texture from V3KY go download their pack [here](https://www.mediafire.com/file/awq4ccjyqn0cmf8/%2521__%25C2%25A73%25C2%25A7lColer%25C2%25A7b%25C2%25A7lFault_%25C2%25A78%25).

![ColerFault pack image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d289c1b8d033426beee4d9816ad8f76a6d8d085.png)

# 💘 Support:
To help me and make me get back to work making more mods, share and recommend this texture pack. Thank you !!!

You can also try my other mods on my [profile page :)](https://modrinth.com/user/Polr)
